series_metadata.series_description: Reviews and related correspondence documenting county agency child abuse and neglect cases, including reports of specific agency action to address instances of neglect and abuse. Most of the hard copy records are maintained in district offices. Copies of the correspondence are maintained on-site.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 60 days after imaging and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 10 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
